title: Antenna Resonance — extrapolating a rational transfer function to the out-of-band roll-off
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean in-band power response (ignores structure) -> ~0.1
single-resonance Lorentzian A/(1+B*(f-c)^2) via reciprocal linearisation: captures the peak and a 1/f^2 tail but is symmetric in f and mis-sizes both out-of-band skirts
recover the true band-pass rational K*f^2/((f0^2-f^2)^2+(f0*f/Q)^2) by grid-searching the hidden (f0,Q) with K solved in closed form; matches the real roll-off so it extrapolates far better
alternatives: finer (f0,Q) grid, continuous Levenberg-style refinement, higher-order rational forms, or trading the complexity penalty against held-out error
